inputs.text: Maine kal raat se bahut tezi se bukhaar chadha hai, sar dard bhi bahut hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Common cause of fever and headache in this age group

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely without other symptoms like retro-orbital pain or rash

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhaar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are key symptoms

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Still a possibility, but less likely without joint pain

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely with these specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhaar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aata hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Rash and bleeding gums are not typical

inputs.text: Main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar raha hoon, kaale daane aur chhalein Nikal aaye hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Hemorrhagic signs and extreme weakness confirm the diagnosis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to specific symptoms and signs

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of typical symptoms
